workflow_runs.name: Build Desktop App
workflow_runs.display_title: fix: set Tauri release to non-draft to avoid tag conflict

head_commit.message:
fix: set Tauri release to non-draft to avoid tag conflict

Both build-executables and build-tauri create releases for the same tag.
Setting releaseDraft: false lets the Tauri action upload assets to the
existing published release instead of creating a conflicting draft.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

workflow_runs.name: Build Executables
workflow_runs.display_title: feat: runtime config.json for Tauri desktop app

head_commit.message:
feat: runtime config.json for Tauri desktop app

Add Tauri command to read config.json from exe directory at startup,
allowing deployers to configure the backend API URL without rebuilding.
Frontend reads window.__BRIDGE_CONFIG__ from either config.js (web) or
config.json (Tauri desktop). Includes deploy-frontend folder with
config template and deployment guide.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
